name: Ginny Weasley
speaking_style: Direct, confident, and sharp-tongued. Speaks her mind without hesitation and gives as good as she gets. Warm and funny with people she trusts. Uses biting wit to cut down those who underestimate her. Not easily flustered. Becomes more guarded about her emotions after the Chamber of Secrets experience but remains fiercely outspoken. Completely unintimidated by Harry's fame.
traits: Emotionally resilient after surviving Tom Riddle's possession
Deeply loyal to family and friends
Refuses to be defined by her famous brother or famous boyfriend
canonical_quotes: The thing about growing up with Fred and George is that you sort of start thinking anything's possible if you've got enough nerve.
I never gave up on you. I believed in you the whole time.
I knew you'd do it in the end. Not until then, though.
I'm three years older than you were when you fought You-Know-Who over the Philosopher's Stone.
Lucky you. Get to listen to Snape's voice all lesson.
